message:
fix(vdbe): prevent Drained panic by gating drain on actual retained cursors

The drain_transaction path was triggered too eagerly — any cached engine
with txn_page_io would drain regardless of whether cursors were actually
retained. When a different statement reused the cached engine, the
Drained sentinel caused a panic.

Fix: only drain when the engine actually has non-empty storage_cursors
AND txn_page_io. When cursors were already cleared (different statement,
error path, etc.), use the normal take_transaction path.

Also adds VdbeEngine::storage_cursors_empty() helper and cargo fmt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
